Long article regression

Paragraph number 01 of the long article fixture. This sentence is repeated several times to bulk up the body so the total HTML easily exceeds eight kilobytes, ensuring the truncation regression at four kilobytes documented in reader issue 1239 would be caught by an assertion on the final paragraph.
